text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oooh... It's finally time. I can feel my heart
pounding...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I just know my feelings will reach all those
watching me!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I'm going to win this race.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win it so I can bring warm smiles to
everyone's faces!
